scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/dashboard install && npm --prefix apps/planner install && npm --prefix apps/studio install && npm --prefix packages/shared install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n Dashboard,Planner,Studio -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix apps/planner" "npm run dev --prefix apps/studio"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix packages/shared && npm run build --prefix apps/dashboard && npm run build --prefix apps/planner && npm run build --prefix apps/studio
scripts.build:backends: npm run build --prefix apps/dashboard/backend && npm run build --prefix apps/planner/backend && npm run build --prefix apps/studio/backend
scripts.build:frontends: npm run build --prefix apps/dashboard/frontend && npm run build --prefix apps/planner/frontend && npm run build --prefix apps/studio/frontend
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:backends && npm run build:frontends && cd electron && npm run build:win
